category_sources: source_facts.description says rqbit is a fast command-line bittorrent client and server; official GitHub repository describes it as a bittorrent client in Rust.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rqbit; official GitHub repository is ikatson/rqbit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for rqbit.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ikatson/rqbit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line bittorrent client and server; official GitHub repository describes the project as a bittorrent client.
